approved_by: human governance decision approving E5 bootstrap execution with scope adjustments 1–7

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

modified_files: apps/mobile/package.json — added Expo Router dependencies, expo-secure-store, expo-linking, expo-constants, react-native-screens, react-native-safe-area-context, react-native-gesture-handler, and @types/react devDependency.
apps/mobile/tsconfig.json — expanded include to src, app, app.json, and babel.config.js; set rootDir to project root to cover app/ route files.
pnpm-lock.yaml — updated by pnpm install after dependency changes.
mutations.note: node_modules/ directories are install artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Expo Router v4 with file-based routing; main field set to expo-router/entry.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: TASKPRO-TECH-001 establishes Expo Router as canonical; TASKPRO-NAV-001 route structure maps to route groups.
Mirrors role-based app structure from TASKPRO-NAV-001 while keeping URLs clean.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: expo-secure-store for access token/session persistence with memory fallback.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E5 defines the persistence contract; encryption and fallback storage are deferred to later expeditions.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: NavigationGuard in app/_layout.tsx redirects unauthenticated users to /login and authenticated users to their role home.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Shell-level routing invariant: auth state determines which group is reachable.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: SafeAreaProvider > ThemeProvider > AuthProvider, exposed through RootProviders.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Consumes E3 ThemeProvider and E2 tokens; keeps app/_layout.tsx focused on navigation.
TASKPRO-TECH-001 deep-link requirement; full deep-link route mapping belongs to later expeditions.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Login screen offers Customer and Technician sign-in buttons that create a synthetic session.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E5 is shell-only; real authentication is E6. The mock lets NavigationGuard and role routing be validated.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Added /* global module */ comment to babel.config.js because the shared flat config does not define Node globals.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Local implementation decision; no change to the shared @taskpro/eslint package.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Added @types/react as an explicit devDependency rather than relying on transitive types.
deviations_from_plan.justification: Required for deterministic TypeScript resolution in the mobile workspace under pnpm strict peer rules.

validation_results.note: Runtime launch/deep-link behavior was not validated against a simulator or device in this expedition.

exclusions: No real API calls or Supabase client usage.
No business workflows (booking, messaging, marketplace, payments).
No screen-level feature logic beyond navigation and sign-out placeholders.
No E2E or runtime tests; shell was validated via typecheck and lint only.
No changes to knowledge/ authored artifacts.
No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record and governance-0012.
No git commits, branches, or pushes performed.
